prompt: Determine whether the work meets the applicable code, spec, drawing, or manufacturer requirement.
scenario: In a T4 work setting, the evaluated element is P-303 Gas piping within 2.2 Mechanical - Piping & Plumbing. The relevant subcategory is 2.2.3 Plumbing - Supply. The observed field condition is: missing sediment trap/drip leg. The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors IFGC, NFPA 54.
title: T4 P-303 Code/spec compliance
